aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Ralph's Heating due to insufficient conversational content and missing schema markup for FAQs and How-To guides.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with relevant HVAC questions and answers.
Create How-To guides for common HVAC issues and maintenance tips.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data prevents AI from recognizing Ralph's as an authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts through detailed guides and schema markup.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Ralph's is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ and How-To schema consistently rank higher in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement targeted schema markup and create conversational content to boost AI visibility and authority.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; act now to secure your position.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Ralph's Heating & Air Conditioning
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found untapped opportunities to make your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven search and boost your lead generation.
